debug_info.goal:
z : HurwitzRatHat
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
let e : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  suffices ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), e z = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ z' by
    obtain ⟨N, z', h⟩ := this
    refine ⟨N, z', (e.injective ?_).symm⟩
    simp only [map_mul, h, j₁, j₂, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgEquiv.comp_apply,
      AlgEquiv.coe_algHom, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
    simp [e, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul]
  induction e z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul q x =>
    use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • x
    simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
    congr 1
    rw [← Rat.num_div_den q, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm]
    congr; norm_cast
  | add x y hx hy =>
    obtain ⟨Nx, x', rfl⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨Ny, y', rfl⟩ := hy
    use Nx * Ny, Ny • x' + Nx • y'
    simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
    rw [← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
    congr 1; push_cast
    rw [mul_inv, mul_add, mul_assoc, mul_inv_cancel_right₀, mul_comm (Nx : ℚ)⁻¹,
      mul_assoc, mul_inv_cancel_right₀]
    · norm_cast; linarith [Ny.2]
    · norm_cast; linarith [Nx.2]
